cost_analysis.note: Backtest plays each suggestion against every historical draw.

prev_suggestions_performance.note: No draws occurred after suggestions were generated.

analysis.llm_summary: Top 5 numbers are selected from the highest scoring candidates, all fitting well with the most frequent digits per position. The top 50 list extends this by including the next best scoring candidates, ensuring no duplicates and maintaining strong alignment with the frequent digit patterns observed in historical draws.
